composer.placeholder: Ask what matches are on today, or tell me which match to analyze and when.

conversation.draft_bundle_empty: Those cards have already been handled.

clarification.description_fallback: Some required details are still missing before this can continue.

exception.description_fallback: Open the conversation to inspect the failure details.

resumable.description: {{status}} - Return to the conversation to review the latest progress.

last_summary.title: Last completed flow
last_summary.empty_summary: The previous flow is complete. You can start a new request now.

queued.title: Waiting for the previous step to finish
queued.description: Another request in this conversation is still running. This one will start automatically next.

running.title: Working on your latest request
running.description: The manager is processing your request and may gather context, resume a workflow, or call a tool.

failed.title: The latest request did not finish
failed.no_details: No additional error details were returned.

cancelled.queued_title: The latest pending request was cancelled
cancelled.interrupted_description: This request was interrupted while it was running.
cancelled.queued_description: This request was cancelled before execution started.

submit_failed.title: This request could not be started

submitting.title: Starting your request
submitting.description: The request has been sent. Waiting for execution to enter a stable running state.
